name: Never Fail Meringue
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix cornstarch and cold water in a saucepan.
2. Add boiling water to the mixture.
3. Cook, stirring until clear and thickened, then let stand until cold.
4. Beat egg whites on high speed until foamy.
5. Gradually add sugar, beating until stiff but not dry.
6. Turn mixer to low speed and add baking soda and vanilla.
7. Gradually beat in the cold cornstarch mixture.
8. Raise the mixer back to high speed and beat well.
9. Spread meringue over cooled pie filling.
10. Bake at 350 degrees for at least 10 minutes.
